Review this PR using Codex Product Factory Enterprise Edition.

Check:
- Requirement IDs and Jira mapping
- Acceptance criteria coverage
- Tests and traceability
- Security/privacy/AI-safety risks
- Observability and runbook impact
- Release and rollback impact
- Whether Jira statuses follow `configs/jira-statuses.json`

Block if the PR invents business behavior, bypasses policies, or lacks evidence.
